articles.title: In a rare interview, a leader of the world's largest right-wing group talks to NPR - NPR
articles.description: The second-in-command of the RSS, a Hindu nationalist organization in India, rarely speaks to the Western press. Here's what he said about his group's controversial history.
articles.content:
The largest right-wing group in the world is in India.
That group is an all-male, Hindu Nationalist organization called the Rashtriya Swayamsevak Sangh. It's better known by its acronym, the RSS.
I… [+1137 chars]
